segments.text: Lesson 141.
Sally's First Train Ride.

translations.zh-Hans: 萨莉第一次乘火车。

segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer this question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

segments.text: Why was the mother embarrassed?

translations.zh-Hans: 那位母亲为什么感到尴尬？

segments.text: Last week, my four-year-old daughter, Sally, was invited to a children's party.

translations.zh-Hans: 上周，我四岁的女儿萨莉受邀参加一个儿童聚会。

segments.text: I decided to take her by train.

translations.zh-Hans: 我决定带她坐火车去。

segments.text: She was very excited because she had never traveled on a train before.

translations.zh-Hans: 她非常兴奋，因为她以前从未坐过火车。

segments.text: She sat near the window and asked questions about everything she saw.

translations.zh-Hans: 她坐在窗边，对看到的一切都问个不停。

segments.text: Suddenly, a middle-aged lady got on the train and sat opposite Sally.

translations.zh-Hans: 突然，一位中年女士上了火车，在萨莉对面坐下。

segments.text: Hello, little girl, she said.

translations.zh-Hans: “你好，小姑娘。”她说道。

segments.text: Sally did not answer, but looked at her curiously.

translations.zh-Hans: 萨莉没有回答，只是好奇地看着她。

segments.text: The lady was dressed in a blue coat and a large, funny hat.

translations.zh-Hans: 那位女士穿着一件蓝色外套，戴着一顶滑稽的大帽子。

segments.text: After the train had left the station, the lady opened her handbag and took out her powder compact.

translations.zh-Hans: 火车离站后，那位女士打开手提包，取出了粉盒。

segments.text: She then began to make up her face.

translations.zh-Hans: 接着她开始化妆。

segments.text: Why are you doing that?

translations.zh-Hans: “你为什么要那样做？”

segments.text: Sally asked.

translations.zh-Hans: 萨莉问道。

segments.text: To make myself beautiful, the lady answered.

translations.zh-Hans: “为了让自己变漂亮。”那位女士回答。

segments.text: She put away her compact and smiled kindly.

translations.zh-Hans: 她收起粉盒，和善地笑了笑。

segments.text: But you are still ugly, Sally said.

translations.zh-Hans: “可你还是很丑。”萨莉说道。

segments.text: Sally was amused, but I was very embarrassed.

translations.zh-Hans: 萨莉觉得很好笑，可我却非常尴尬。
